title: Comment section from inspect
body:
Hi guys,

I'm trying to get the Comment attribute from the inspect. However, it doesn't seem to be available on the output. Is there something that I'm missing?
If I do podman inspect on that same local image, the comment attribute is there.

Thanks,
Luís

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

If this is about the “comment” per-layer field, as specified in https://github.com/opencontainers/image-spec/blob/main/config.md, that’s not currently available. It’s a reasonable request to add it; it would first need to be added in https://github.com/containers/image .
@mtrmac mind If I take a look at this?
@danishprakash Sure, that would be very welcome.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@mtrmac can i be assigned to this issue
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
